channel.title: Gregg's Handyman Service
channel.description: Recent content on Gregg's Handyman Service

item.title: Services
item.description: Light Fixtures Outlets & Switches Ceiling Fans TV Mounts Minor Painting Blinds Curtains & Rods Door Hardware Grab Bars Shower Curtains Shower Doors Garage Storage Attic Stairs Shelving Laundry Room Cabinets And More!

item.title: Testimonials
item.description: Highly recommend Gregg and his work. He recently installed SafeRack Garage Storage for us and as always did a great job. -Charles Q. Gregg came over and quickly diagnosed and repaired the lock on our storm door. He also repaired a couple of other issues we had. He is knowledgeable and a personable guy. Very reasonable with his charges. So, if you need repairs to your home call Gregg.
